title: Hydrogen From Graphite And Urea
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
An improved dry cell electrolysing urea for the production of hydrogen. DOn't forget that you can buy my books on grahene, supercapacitors, etc. and kits/materials for your own experiments from the webshop at https://secure.workingink.co.uk/working-ink-shop/
